description_long: This is an ornate candelabrum featuring nine tall, white taper candles arranged in a semi-circular pattern. The candles are held in individual, round brass holders that are attached to a central, multi-branched stem. The stem is made of polished brass with a classic, tiered design, and it stands on a wide, stable circular base. Each candle is unlit, with visible blackened wicks at the top, and the wax surfaces appear smooth and pristine. The brass holders and stem have a glossy, reflective finish, giving the object an elegant and formal appearance. This type of candelabrum is typically used as a decorative centerpiece in upscale urban settings such as banquet halls, restaurants, or historic public buildings.
description: A polished brass candelabrum with nine tall, white taper candles arranged in a semi-circle, each held in a glossy brass holder. The base is wide and stable, and the candles are unlit with visible wicks.
description_view_0: Front view showing all nine white candles in a semi-circular arrangement, with the central candle most prominent and the brass holders clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the staggered depth of the candle arrangement, with the rightmost candles more visible and the brass stem's structure apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view where the back row of candles is most visible, and the central stem and base are partially obscured by the candles.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the layered arrangement of the candles and the reflective brass holders, with the leftmost candles more prominent.
